title: Clinical reasoning and AI decision support (PubMed 41236701)
summary: Peer-reviewed study on how AI decision-support tools intersect with clinician judgement in practice.

title: Safety considerations for medical LLMs
summary: arXiv preprint on safety questions specific to medical large language models.

title: AI in clinical settings (PMC 12710678)
summary: Peer-reviewed article on AI integration in clinical practice and associated risks.

title: Minds in Crisis: How the AI Revolution is Impacting Mental Health
summary: Survey paper on the mental-health impacts of widespread AI adoption.

title: High-performance medicine: the convergence of human and artificial intelligence
summary: Foundational paper framing how AI changes medical practice — still a key reference point.

title: Use of generative AI chatbots and wellness applications for mental health
summary: APA's longer advisory article on the risks and use of AI chatbots for mental health support.

title: Tech Companies and Policymakers Must Safeguard Youth Mental Health in AI Technologies
summary: Policy-leaning article on safeguarding youth mental health as AI products spread — a useful primer at the medical/policy intersection.

title: A multi-turn framework for evaluating AI misuse in fraud and cybercrime scenarios
summary: Paper proposing a framework to evaluate how AI systems can be misused across fraud and cybercrime — sits at the finance/cybersecurity intersection.

title: Machine bias in the criminal justice system
summary: The reference investigative piece on bias in algorithmic risk-assessment tools used in sentencing.

title: Coded Bias
summary: Documentary on algorithmic bias and the activists fighting it. A strong intro to the human stakes of the topic.
